title: Mean Things Overcome Mighty.
content:
By the weak'st means things mighty are o'erthrown.
    He's lord of thy life who contemns his own.
meaning:
Robert Herrick's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Mean Things Overcome Mighty."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
